evals.prompt: I have a spec/ for LatePay (brief, scope, product, personas). Write the marketing positioning before I do copy.
evals.expected_output: spec/positioning.md from the template: 11 sections (positioning statement, category, messaging pillars, differentiation, objections, anti-personas, switching forces, customer language, brand voice, proof points, before->after). References brief/product/personas by anchor (no restated sentences). Pillars map to scope features. Differentiation against the named current alternative. Proof real or OPEN. No fluff.

assertions.text: Writes spec/positioning.md with all 11 sections in order
No verbatim sentence copied from brief.md/product.md/personas.md (referenced by anchor)
Every messaging pillar maps to a real scope.md feature / product in-scope item
Differentiation is against the named current alternative (manual email/basic reminders)
Proof points are real or marked OPEN (no fabricated metrics/customers)
No banned fluff words; no <placeholder> left
